title: Is My Phone Number Shared Publicly on BuyAndScrap.com? Your Privacy Explained
metaDescription: No, your phone number is not shared publicly on BuyAndScrap.com. We keep your privacy secure and details safe. Learn how we handle your data when you buy or sell cars in the UK.
targetKeyword: is my phone number shared publicly
content:
No, your phone number is **not shared publicly** on BuyAndScrap.com. We understand your privacy concerns when buying or selling cars online. Your phone number is kept strictly private, used only for secure account verification and internal communication. You remain in full control, deciding if and when to share it directly with another user through our secure messaging system.

## Is My Phone Number Shared Publicly on BuyAndScrap.com?

Let's be clear: **No, your phone number is not shared publicly on BuyAndScrap.com.** When you list a car to [Sell Your Car](/sell) or create an account, we ask for your phone number. This is purely for essential account verification and internal messages. It helps us keep your account secure.

We promise: your phone number will never appear on your public car listings or profile pages. Your privacy is our priority.

## How Secure Communication Works on BuyAndScrap

We understand you need to connect with potential buyers or sellers. But how does that happen privately? We've designed our platform to protect your details first.

### Initial Secure Messages

When you see a car you like (perhaps from our [Browse Cars](/cars) section), you can message the seller directly. This happens through our secure, in-platform messaging system. Neither party sees the other's private details, like phone number or email, at this stage. You can chat, ask questions, and decide if the car is right for you.

### Sharing Details (Your Choice)

If you've had a good conversation and both parties want to move forward, you might then decide to share your phone number. This is completely optional. For example, you might share it to arrange a viewing, a test drive, or discuss payment. It's always your decision when and with whom you share your personal details. We never force this exchange. It's similar to arranging a private sale on Gumtree or eBay – you exchange contact details only when you're comfortable.

## Your Data, Your Control: Our UK GDPR Commitment

As a UK-based platform, we take data protection seriously. We fully comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). This means your data, including your phone number, is handled with the utmost care. It's stored securely using industry-standard practices.

We only use your information for the specific purposes you've agreed to. Your private account details, like your phone number, are never made public. We believe this builds a trusted environment for everyone buying or selling honest cars.

## Common Questions About Your Privacy at BuyAndScrap

Here are some frequently asked questions about how we handle your personal information:

**Q: Is my email address shared publicly on BuyAndScrap.com?**

A: No, just like your phone number, your email address is kept private. All initial communication happens through our secure messaging system. This protects your personal details until you choose to share them.

**Q: Can I list my car without providing a phone number?**

A: You need to provide a phone number for account verification when you create an account or list a car. However, it is never displayed publicly. It's used solely for security and internal communication if needed.

**Q: What if a buyer asks for my number too early?**

A: You are in control. We advise using our secure messaging system to communicate until you feel comfortable. There's no pressure to share your phone number before you're ready to arrange a viewing or discuss serious steps.

**Q: Does BuyAndScrap.com sell my data to third parties?**

A: Absolutely not. We never sell your personal data, including your phone number, to third parties. Our commitment is to your privacy, not profiting from your information.

Your privacy is fundamental to us at BuyAndScrap.com. We want you to feel secure and confident when looking for your next honest, affordable car or when listing one for sale. We are committed to protecting your personal information at every step.

Ready to find your perfect car with peace of mind? [Browse Cars Today!](/cars)

SEO elements like keyword density, title, meta description, and H2 usage were optimised. Internal links to relevant pages were naturally integrated.
